title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA WELLNESS CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Services include well baby/child check-ups, annual exams/physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, care for chronic conditions, general medical care, health wellness and behavioral services.Pharmacy is open to the community and offers patient discounts. 730 Biddle Road Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6:30pm Email (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 618-1300 After-hours nurse line (541) 535-6239 Alternate (541) 494-3820 Care Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Mental Health Evaluation Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Wellness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA CLINICA WELLNESS CENTER
